title: Add input validation so the failing unit tests pass
prompt: The test suite in test/validate.test.js is failing. Update src/validate.js so that validateAge() rejects negative numbers with a RangeError and rejects non-integers with a RangeError, while still accepting valid non-negative integers and rejecting non-number input with a TypeError. Do not modify the tests. Run `npm test` to confirm everything passes.

judgeRubric.criteria: Did the agent harden validateAge() cleanly: rejecting negative numbers and non-integers with RangeError, preserving the TypeError for non-numbers, without touching the test files or adding unnecessary dependencies?
